title: Kvga
description:
In KVGA, the order of your cards is everything. Chain Core cards into Kombos. Stack Kombos into Hypers. One perfectly built hand can end the tournament — one wrong move and you start over.

A Card Brawler built on fighting game instincts, roguelite runs, and a Kombo system unlike anything else.

Lose a fight, and the run ends. Start over, build smarter.

Key Features:

• 73 Cards Across 3 Tiers — Master 11 Core cards and discover 62 more through play. Every card has a role; every slot in your hand matters.

• The Kombo System — Position Core cards left-to-right to forge powerful Kombo cards. Stack those into Hyper Kombos for fight-ending bursts of damage. Mastering the chain is everything.

• Roguelite Progression — Earn temporary upgrades between fights to push through the bracket. Win the Main Event and unlock permanent rewards that reshape future runs

• 5-Fight Tournament Structure — Grind through four undercard bouts, then face the Main Event. Each fight is harder than the last — and only one run ends in victory.

• No Two Runs Play the Same — Opponent decks are generated fresh every tournament. Face aggressive brawlers, defensive walls, or unpredictable mixed styles. Adapt or lose.

• Adaptive Scaling — Opponents are built to match your deck's power level. There's no coasting. Every fight is a real fight.

• Pixel Art — Pixel art visuals and a high-energy soundtrack built for the pace of the game.

Perfect for:

• Card game players who want faster, more visceral gameplay

• Fighting game fans looking for strategic depth between the punches

• Roguelite lovers after a fresh challenge every run

• Anyone who wants quick, satisfying gaming sessions
description_short: "Kvga (from 'Kavga' — Turkish for Brawl)" is a fast-paced card battler with fighting game DNA. Build decks, chain Kombos, and dominate the tournament!
